    "standard" and "heavy"; anything remaining is "freight". No external

## Implementation

**`.tmp/classifyWeight.ts`**
```typescript
export type WeightClass = "standard" | "heavy" | "freight";

/**
 * Classifies a parcel weight into a bracket.
 *
 * Brackets:
 *   standard : 0 < weight < 10
 *   heavy    : 10 <= weight < 50
 *   freight  : 50 <= weight <= 1000
 *
 * @throws {Error} if weight <= 0 or weight > 1000
 */
export function classifyWeight(weight: number): WeightClass {
  if (weight <= 0 || weight > 1000) {
    throw new Error(
      `Invalid weight: ${weight}. Weight must be greater than 0 and at most 1000 kg.`
    );
  }

  if (weight < 10) return "standard";
  if (weight < 50) return "heavy";
  return "freight";
}
```
